meta.title: Learning Loop Protocol V13.0 — The Genie Release: the 2 certified runs (fixtures)
meta.source: hb1000-os/blueprint/gap-learning-loop-v13-protocol-the.md §6 — Flood Water Honeycomb Fence (V13_Learning_Loop_Certified_Output.docx) + Get'rDone Model v4 Assessment (20 April 2026)

protocol.version_note: V13 is 'current and only'; archive V8–V12.9.1. V14 = data-model donor only, behaviors pending Tim's confirmation.

phases.name: System of Intake
phases.note: THE HARD GATE — North Star confirmation, Smelling Salts, Emotional Reality Check. No North Star → HALT.

phases.name: System of Innovation
phases.note: GREEN / BLUE / AMBER suggestions; Swarm Minds: JTBD Orphan Hunter + Pure Innovation Swarm.

phases.name: System of Adversarial Integrity
phases.note: Devil's Advocate · The North Star's Voice · The Pragmatist + the Accessibility & Inclusion Audit (5 dimensions).

phases.name: System of Communication
phases.note: Swiss-style presentation + downloadable reference documents (BOTH mandatory). Barstool format = the Swiss-style equivalent for non-technical North Stars.

phases.name: System of Evolution
phases.note: Spirit Check (4 drift dimensions) + proposed amendments + Gamification Gift-Back.

phases.name: System of Certification
phases.note: THE BLUE SEAL STAMP — 90/100, no dimension below 18/20. CERTIFIED / CONDITIONAL / NOT CERTIFIED.

phases.name: Drift Agent
phases.note: 7 drift types: scope_creep · north_star_deviation · phase_skip · threshold_lowered · rabbit_hole · feature_drift · intensity_drift.

phases.name: The Genie
phases.note: Cumulative KPI report, gifts, DINGO cards spawned, persistence. 'The Genie persists. The Loop remembers. The work continues.'

protocol.numbering_note: Phases numbered 0–8 internally; UI may display 'Step n of 9.'
protocol.north_star_rule: The Learning Loop has NO built-in North Star. It is a completely neutral engine. Before every run, the North Star must be declared.

runs.north_star_note: This project serves communities facing real flood risk… Every deliverable must be grounded in that reality. (Emotional Reality Check, verbatim)
runs.smelling_salts: PASSED — Context intact. No drift detected. North Star loaded.
runs.gift_to_the_loop: V13.0 at DRIVEN intensity with Move 37 Extreme is the correct version for early-stage physical product concepts.
runs.closing_voice: The loop is complete. The ducks are swimming… Get'rDone.
runs.source_path: Flood Water Honey Comb fence/Flood Water Honey comb Fence to replace sandbags/V13_Learning_Loop_Certified_Output.docx

north_star.prime: Purpose with Profit — grow people, and people grow the business
north_star.local: Make the Get'rDone Model so clear… an HB1000 reads it and says 'I'm in.'

runs.certification_text: CERTIFIED (CONDITIONAL) — Full certification upon resolution of 15% Rule ambiguity
runs.condition: Full certification upon resolution of 15% Rule ambiguity
runs.condition_note: Accuracy held at 16/20 pending Tim's 15%-Rule decision. The Judge refused to inflate Accuracy 16→18 because the fix was 'a design decision, not a documentation error. It requires Tim's resolution.' Phase-1 critical finding: 'Critical Finding: The 15% Ambiguity' — a design decision flagged for Tim, not silently fixed.

phase_ledger.name: Drift Agent
phase_ledger.kpi: CLEAR — zero drift across all 7 dimensions

genie_outputs.gift_back: Reusable Barstool template (Barstool Conversation format = the Swiss-style equivalent for non-technical North Stars — proposed as a protocol amendment)
